title: 'anash #0605
definition:
1) to be weak, sick, frail
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to be incurable
        1a2) to be sick
        1a3) desperate, incurable, desperately wicked, woeful,
             very sick (pass participle) (metaph.)
    1b) (Niphal) to be sick
